'''Aleron''' was a smog-covered [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Freeworlds Territory]]. It had domed canyon [[City/Legends|cities]] and underground cities. Its crust and mantle were rich in valuable [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]] and [[Ore/Legends|ores]]. Discovered during the [[Twelve Kingdoms Era]] of the [[Tapani Empire]], the world was colonized by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] from [[Gilliana]]. Aleron was the headquarters of [[Aleron Trade Cooperative]], [[Macander Heavy Ores]], and [[LIN Corporation]]. With their hold of three major corporations, Aleron was given a voting member of the [[League of Tapani Freeworlds]].
